case_title: BELFOR, WILLIAM VS JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR. $2,464.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,504.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIE JR.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
